'''fohathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinological|vaccinological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinological|vaccinological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fohathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohathithi|fohathithi]] || [[word:fohathiji|fohathiji]] || [[word:fohathishi|fohathishi]] || [[word:fohathiki|fohathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohathuthuthu|fohathuthuthu]] || [[word:fohathujuju|fohathujuju]] || [[word:fohathushushu|fohathushushu]] || [[word:fohathukuku|fohathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohathuthu|fohathuthu]] || [[word:fohathuju|fohathuju]] || [[word:fohathushu|fohathushu]] || [[word:fohathuku|fohathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohathufthuf|fohathufthuf]] || [[word:fohathufjuf|fohathufjuf]] || [[word:fohathufshuf|fohathufshuf]] || [[word:fohathufkuf|fohathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohathethe|fohathethe]] || [[word:fohatheje|fohatheje]] || [[word:fohatheshe|fohatheshe]] || [[word:fohatheke|fohatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohathothotho|fohathothotho]] || [[word:fohathojojo|fohathojojo]] || [[word:fohathoshosho|fohathoshosho]] || [[word:fohathokoko|fohathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohathotho|fohathotho]] || [[word:fohathojo|fohathojo]] || [[word:fohathosho|fohathosho]] || [[word:fohathoko|fohathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohathofthof|fohathofthof]] || [[word:fohathofjof|fohathofjof]] || [[word:fohathofshof|fohathofshof]] || [[word:fohathofkof|fohathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfthĂŻf|fohathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfjĂŻf|fohathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfshĂŻf|fohathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfkĂŻf|fohathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fohathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fohathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fohathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fohathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfthĂŻf|fohathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfjĂŻf|fohathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfshĂŻf|fohathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfkĂŻf|fohathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfthĂŻf|fohathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfjĂŻf|fohathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfshĂŻf|fohathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fohathĂŻfkĂŻf|fohathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohathĂŠthĂŠ|fohathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fohathĂŠjĂŠ|fohathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fohathĂŠshĂŠ|fohathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fohathĂŠkĂŠ|fohathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohathathatha|fohathathatha]] || [[word:fohathajaja|fohathajaja]] || [[word:fohathashasha|fohathashasha]] || [[word:fohathakaka|fohathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohathatha|fohathatha]] || [[word:fohathaja|fohathaja]] || [[word:fohathasha|fohathasha]] || [[word:fohathaka|fohathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohathafthaf|fohathafthaf]] || [[word:fohathafjaf|fohathafjaf]] || [[word:fohathafshaf|fohathafshaf]] || [[word:fohathafkaf|fohathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fohathasha|fohathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fohathshĂ«asha|fohathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fohathroasha|fohathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fohathmuasha|fohathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fohathyaasha|fohathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofohathnkshĂ«asha|gofohathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofohathnkroasha|gofohathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofohathnkmuasha|gofohathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofohathnkyaasha|gofohathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fohahathasha|fohahathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fohahathshĂ«asha|fohahathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fohahathroasha|fohahathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fohahathmuasha|fohahathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fohahathyaasha|fohahathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofohahathnkshĂ«asha|gofohahathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofohahathnkroasha|gofohahathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofohahathnkmuasha|gofohahathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofohahathnkyaasha|gofohahathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fehĂŠthasha|fehĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fehĂŠthshĂ«asha|fehĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fehĂŠthroasha|fehĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fehĂŠthmuasha|fehĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fehĂŠthyaasha|fehĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofehĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gofehĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofehĂŠthnkroasha|gofehĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofehĂŠthnkmuasha|gofehĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofehĂŠthnkyaasha|gofehĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fohfathasha|fohfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fohfathshĂ«asha|fohfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fohfathroasha|fohfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fohfathmuasha|fohfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fohfathyaasha|fohfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofohfathnkshĂ«asha|gofohfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofohfathnkroasha|gofohfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofohfathnkmuasha|gofohfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofohfathnkyaasha|gofohfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
